childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 7, "label" : "Anticipated Clinical Hours", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : "%FetchHPFData|1:Anticipated_Clinical_Hours__c%", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "^[0-9]{0,3}$", "ptrnErrText" : "Error: Anticipated Clinical Hours accepts a maximum value of a 3-digit number", "placeholder" : "", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: TypeOfRate
